LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 17, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 21, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's motion To Vacate Judgment is Granted, for good cause shown. The default and judgment against Tam T. Nguyen entered on August 23, 2011 will be vacated and the entire action dismissed with prejudice. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion To Vacate Judgment is continued to June 24, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 17, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied.
